senses.definition: something we use to cover or decorate a part of the floor that is usually made of thick materials or animal skin

examples.x: I rolled up the rug to clean the floor underneath it.
The rug in front of the fireplace provides a comfortable spot to sit.
The soft rug in the living room adds warmth to the space.
We have a colorful rug in the children's playroom.

senses.definition: a thick piece of woven cloth, used as a floor covering

examples.x: I laid the baby down on the soft carpet for a nap.
I vacuumed the carpet to remove the dust and dirt.
My grandmother got angry when I accidentally spilled juice on the carpet.
The Persian carpet in the living room adds elegance and style to the space.
The soft carpet feels nice under my feet.

senses.definition: a cut pile carpet made of twisted yarns that are heat-treated to give a plush, velvety texture and a uniform, luxurious appearance
a cut pile carpet with a slightly twisted fiber construction that creates a textured, casual appearance, which can help hide footprints and vacuum marks

examples.x: The textured carpet in the living room adds a cozy, inviting feel to the space.
I chose a textured carpet for the hallway because it hides dirt better than a smooth one.
The textured carpet helps to reduce noise, making the room feel quieter.
She loves the soft feel of the textured carpet under her feet as she walks across the room.
The textured carpet’s design complements the furniture perfectly, giving the room a stylish look.

senses.definition: a type of carpet with a smooth, velvety surface and a dense, even pile height that provides a luxurious feel

examples.x: The living room was transformed with a plush carpet that made the space feel cozy and welcoming.
I love walking barefoot on the plush carpet in my bedroom; it feels so soft and warm.
The plush carpet in the hallway adds a touch of luxury to the house.
After installing the plush carpet, the room instantly became more comfortable and inviting.
She chose a plush carpet for the nursery to create a soft and safe space for her baby.

senses.definition: a style of carpet in which the yarn loops are left uncut on the surface, creating a durable and low-maintenance flooring option

examples.x: The office was outfitted with a durable loop pile carpet to withstand heavy foot traffic.
She chose a loop pile carpet for the hallway because it is easy to clean and maintains its shape.
Loop pile carpets are perfect for homes with pets, as the fibers are less likely to show dirt.
He noticed that the loop pile carpet in the kitchen hid stains better than traditional carpet types.

senses.definition: a style of carpet where the loops of yarn are cut, resulting in individual tufts of yarn that stand upright and create a plush, dense surface

examples.x: The living room was updated with a soft cut pile carpet, adding a cozy touch to the space.
I chose a cut pile carpet for the bedroom because of its plush feel underfoot.
The cut pile carpet in the hallway looked elegant, but it showed footprints quickly.
We decided on a cut pile carpet for the lounge area to enhance comfort and style.
She loved the soft, velvety feel of the cut pile carpet in her new home.

senses.definition: a type of flooring consisting of small, modular carpet pieces that can be installed in a variety of patterns and designs

examples.x: Carpet tiles are a great option for covering office floors, as they are easy to install and replace.
The colorful carpet tiles in the living room helped to brighten up the space.
If one carpet tile gets stained, you can simply replace it without having to redo the entire floor.
Carpet tiles are available in a variety of textures and patterns, making them perfect for any design style.
We chose carpet tiles for the playroom because they are easy to clean and can be replaced if damaged.

senses.definition: a type of flooring made from solid hardwood boards, typically cut from a single piece of wood

examples.x: The living room has beautiful hardwood flooring that adds a warm, inviting feel.
Hardwood flooring can be a great investment because it lasts for many years and increases the value of a home.
The rich color of the hardwood flooring perfectly complements the modern furniture.

senses.definition: a type of flooring made from a mixture of cement, water, and aggregates, such as sand or gravel, that is poured into a flat surface and then cured and polished

examples.x: The kitchen has sleek concrete flooring, giving it a modern and industrial feel.
Concrete flooring in the garage makes cleaning up oil spills much easier.
He chose concrete flooring for the basement because it is durable and easy to maintain.
The home's concrete flooring was stained to add warmth and color to the rooms.
Many commercial spaces prefer concrete flooring due to its strength and low maintenance.

senses.definition: any type of flooring made from natural stone, such as marble, granite, limestone, or slate

examples.x: The kitchen was redesigned with sleek stone flooring, giving it a modern and elegant look.
Stone flooring is often chosen for bathrooms because it is durable and water-resistant.
The house had beautiful stone flooring throughout, adding to its rustic charm.
The hotel lobby was lined with polished marble stone flooring, creating a luxurious atmosphere.
After years of use, the stone flooring still looked as good as new with just a bit of polishing.

senses.definition: a traditionally hand-woven floor covering with intricate designs and patterns, that originates in Iran
a flat-woven textile traditionally made by hand, characterized by vibrant colors, geometric patterns, and durable construction.

examples.x: The living room looked cozy with the new kilim rug on the floor, adding a touch of color and warmth.
The traditional kilim he bought during his travels became the centerpiece of the hallway.
They placed a kilim over the wooden bench to make it more comfortable for guests.
The kilim’s bold, geometric patterns gave the room a distinct cultural feel.
The shop offered a variety of kilims, each with unique designs and rich colors.

senses.definition: a type of rug made by pulling loops of yarn or fabric through a woven base using a latch hook

examples.x: The living room looked cozier with the addition of a colorful hooked rug by the fireplace.
She spent hours working on her hooked rug, carefully pulling the yarn through the fabric.
The vintage hooked rug on the floor had a beautiful floral design that added charm to the room.
As a child, she loved to sit on the soft hooked rug while reading her books.
The artist displayed a collection of handmade hooked rugs at the local craft fair.

senses.definition: a type of rug made from strips of fabric or yarn, braided together to create a circular or oval shape

examples.x: The braided rug in the hallway added a cozy touch to the home.
She chose a colorful braided rug to brighten up the living room.
After months of crafting, he finally finished the braided rug for his kitchen.
The braided rug felt soft and warm underfoot, perfect for the cold floor.
They decided to place a braided rug near the door to catch dirt and moisture.

senses.definition: a type of shag wool rug with a long pile, traditionally made in Greece

examples.x: She laid a soft flokati by the fireplace to make the room feel cozier.
The kids spilled juice on the flokati rug, so I had to clean it carefully to keep it looking nice.
The white flokati in the bedroom made the space feel more inviting and comfortable.
They bought a colorful flokati rug to brighten up their living room.
I love walking barefoot on the flokati because it feels so soft and warm.

senses.definition: a type of rug designed specifically for use in outdoor living spaces, such as patios, decks, and porches

examples.x: The outdoor rug on the patio added a cozy touch to the garden seating area.
After a rainy day, it was easy to shake off the dirt from the outdoor rug and let it dry in the sun.
We bought a colorful outdoor rug to brighten up the deck during the summer months.
She placed an outdoor rug under the table to make the patio feel more like a living space.
They chose a striped outdoor rug to match the cushions on their porch chairs.

senses.definition: a small rug used to complement the design or color scheme of a room

examples.x: The accent rug in the living room added a pop of color to the neutral furniture.
She placed an accent rug by the door to welcome guests with a touch of style.
He chose a bold accent rug to complement the soft tones of the sofa.
An accent rug with geometric patterns brought a modern touch to the room.
The vibrant accent rug in the kitchen brightened up the otherwise plain floor.

senses.definition: a decorative rug that covers only a portion of the floor and is often used to define a space or add color and texture to a room

examples.x: She placed an area rug under the coffee table to add warmth to the living room.
The area rug in the hallway helped brighten up the space with its vibrant colors.
We chose a large area rug to make the dining room feel cozier and more inviting.
He decided to move the area rug to a new spot for a fresh look in the room.
The soft area rug felt nice underfoot, especially in the colder months.

senses.definition: a type of carpet that is woven with a specific technique to create a textured, durable surface

examples.x: The living room was beautifully decorated with an ingrain carpet that had a classic geometric design.
After many years of use, the ingrain carpet in the hallway still looked as vibrant as the day it was installed.
They chose an ingrain carpet for their office because of its durability and stylish pattern.
The ingrain carpet added a rich texture to the dining room, complementing the wooden furniture.
The hotel lobby had an ingrain carpet that withstood heavy foot traffic without showing much wear.

senses.definition: a type of carpet that is woven on a wide loom, typically 12-15 feet wide, and then cut to the desired length
a type of dense, durable, and woven carpet

examples.x: The hotel lobby featured moquette carpeting that added a touch of elegance to the space.
They chose a moquette pattern for the new office to ensure durability and comfort.

senses.definition: a flat piece of baked clay or other material, mostly in the shape of a square, used for covering floors or walls

examples.x: The kitchen floor was covered in ceramic tiles, creating a clean and durable surface that was easy to clean.
The bathroom walls were adorned with colorful mosaic tiles, adding a touch of elegance to the space.
The roof of the house was made of terracotta tiles, providing excellent insulation and weather protection.
The interior designer recommended subway tiles for the backsplash in the modern kitchen renovation.
The swimming pool was lined with mosaic tiles, creating a shimmering mosaic pattern on the water's surface.

senses.definition: a small rug, typically made of wool, that is placed in front of a fireplace to provide warmth and protection from sparks and embers

examples.x: The hearthrug added a cozy touch to the living room, right in front of the fireplace.
We placed a hearthrug to protect the wooden floor from any sparks that might fly out of the fireplace.
The hearthrug matched the color of the room’s decor and helped keep the area neat and warm.
The hearthrug is thick enough to catch any ashes that fall from the fireplace.

senses.definition: an object put on the ground in front of a door, used for cleaning the shoes on

examples.x: She wiped her feet on the doormat before entering the house.
The doormat was old and covered with mud after the rainy day.
They bought a new doormat with a funny welcome message.
The doormat was placed outside the front door to catch dirt from shoes.
He stepped on the doormat to clean his boots before coming inside.

senses.definition: a stiff material with a smooth and shiny surface, used for covering a floor

examples.x: The kitchen floor was covered with durable linoleum that was easy to clean and maintain.
They chose linoleum for the bathroom because of its water resistance and affordability.
The linoleum tiles came in a variety of colors, allowing them to match any home decor.
After years of use, the linoleum floor still looked as good as new.

senses.definition: a small piece of thick cloth-like material that is used to cover part of a floor, particularly in order to provide decoration
a type of long and narrow rug that is typically used to cover hallways, entryways, or other narrow spaces in a home or building
the wear and tear of a carpet or rug over time, resulting in a flattened appearance due to constant foot traffic
a type of carpet or area rug that has a deep and plush pile with long, loose yarns that give it a shaggy appearance and a soft, textured feel underfoot

examples.x: I love the softness of the shag rug; it feels so comfortable underfoot.
The shag rug in the living room adds a cozy touch to the space.
After cleaning the shag rug, it looks as good as new.
The shag rug gave the room a relaxed, retro vibe.
The kids love playing on the shag rug because it is so soft.

senses.definition: a type of traditional Japanese flooring made from woven straw mats

examples.x: The living room in the traditional Japanese house was furnished with tatami mats, creating a serene and peaceful atmosphere.
The tatami mats in the room added warmth and comfort during the colder months.
After removing the shoes at the entrance, we walked carefully on the tatami mats to preserve their cleanliness and texture.

senses.definition: a small rug or mat placed outside of the front door of a home or business to greet visitors and encourage them to wipe their feet before entering
a durable type of loop pile carpet made from various fibers and commonly used in residential and commercial settings due to its resistance to wear

examples.x: The Berber carpet in the living room added a cozy, textured feel to the space.
I chose a Berber carpet for the hallway because of its durability and ability to hide dirt.
The earthy tones of the Berber carpet complemented the natural wood furniture perfectly.
Berber carpet is a popular choice for homes with pets, as it resists stains and damage.
After years of use, the Berber carpet still looked great thanks to its strong, looped fibers.

senses.definition: a highly twisted and durable carpet with a textured, curly surface that helps to mask footprints and other marks

examples.x: After installing the frieze carpet, the room looked more inviting and comfortable.
The frieze carpet in the living room added a cozy and textured feel to the space.
We chose a frieze carpet for the hallway because it hides dirt and footprints well.

senses.definition: a type of flooring made of small wood pieces arranged in geometric patterns
a small rug or mat placed on the floor in a bathroom, typically outside the shower or bathtub, to provide a non-slip surface and to absorb water

examples.x: She stepped onto the soft bath mat after getting out of the shower.
The bath mat was soaked after the kids splashed water everywhere.
The colorful bath mat added a nice touch to the plain bathroom.
He washed the bath mat to remove stains and dirt.
The hotel provided a clean bath mat along with fresh towels.

senses.definition: a type of floor mat made from rubber material that provides a slip-resistant and durable surface

examples.x: The gym floor was covered with rubber mats to provide a safe, non-slip surface for exercise.
The workshop had rubber mats on the floor to reduce noise and protect the surface from tools.
The kitchen had a rubber mat under the stove to prevent spills from damaging the floor.
He bought a rubber mat to put by the door so that dirt from shoes would not get inside.
The rubber mat in the bathroom kept the floor dry after every shower.
